sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQQUESTDOC (IDDOCQST NUMBER(10,0), IDQUEST NUMBER(10,0), DESCRICAO VARCHAR2(500), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQQUESTDOC PRIMARY KEY (IDDOCQST))
sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE TGQQUESTDOC (IDDOCQST BIGINT, IDQUEST BIGINT, DESCRICAO VARCHAR(500), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQQUESTDOC PRIMARY KEY (IDDOCQST))

sql.oracle:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW VW_VENC_QUALIF_FORN AS
SELECT Q.IDQUALIF, Q.CODPARC, PAR.NOMEPARC,
PAR.EMAILQUESTIONARIO AS EMAIL_FORNECEDOR,
CFG.EMAILNOTIFYQF AS EMAIL_NOTIFICACAO_EMPRESA,
PARAM.DIASVENCCQA AS DIAS_PARAMETRO_AVISO,
Q.IDQUEST, Q.QUALIFICACAO, Q.DATAVALIDADE,
TRUNC(Q.DATAVALIDADE) - TRUNC(SYSDATE) AS DIAS_RESTANTES,
CASE WHEN Q.IDQUEST IS NOT NULL THEN 'QUESTIONARIO' ELSE 'QUALIFICACAO' END AS TIPO_VENCIMENTO,
CASE WHEN Q.IDQUEST IS NOT NULL THEN 'Questionário de Fornecedor' ELSE NVL(Q.QUALIFICACAO, 'Qualificação de Fornecedor') END AS NOME_DOCUMENTO,
CASE WHEN TRUNC(Q.DATAVALIDADE) - TRUNC(SYSDATE) = 0 THEN 'VENCIMENTO_HOJE'
WHEN TRUNC(Q.DATAVALIDADE) - TRUNC(SYSDATE) = PARAM.DIASVENCCQA AND PARAM.DIASVENCCQA > 0 THEN 'AVISO_VENCIMENTO'
WHEN TRUNC(Q.DATAVALIDADE) - TRUNC(SYSDATE) < 0 THEN 'VENCIDO'
ELSE 'SEM_NOTIFICACAO' END AS TIPO_NOTIFICACAO,
CASE WHEN TRUNC(Q.DATAVALIDADE) - TRUNC(SYSDATE) = 0 THEN 'S'
WHEN TRUNC(Q.DATAVALIDADE) - TRUNC(SYSDATE) = PARAM.DIASVENCCQA AND PARAM.DIASVENCCQA > 0 THEN 'S'
ELSE 'N' END AS ENVIAR_NOTIFICACAO
FROM TGQQUALIFFORN Q
INNER JOIN TGFPAR PAR ON PAR.CODPARC = Q.CODPARC
CROSS JOIN ( SELECT EMAILNOTIFYQF FROM TGQCONFIG WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) CFG
CROSS JOIN ( SELECT NVL( ( SELECT INTEIRO FROM TSIPAR WHERE CHAVE = 'DIASVENCCQA' AND CODUSU = STP_GET_CODUSULOGADO ), NVL( ( SELECT INTEIRO FROM TSIPAR WHERE CHAVE = 'DIASVENCCQA' AND CODUSU = 0 ), 0 ) ) AS DIASVENCCQA FROM DUAL ) PARAM
WHERE Q.DATAVALIDADE IS NOT NULL

CREATE TABLE TGQLOGNOTIFVENC (IDLOG NUMBER(10,0) NOT NULL, IDQUALIF NUMBER(10,0) NOT NULL, TIPO_NOTIFICACAO VARCHAR2(30) NOT NULL, DTNOTIF DATE NOT NULL, DHENVIO DATE, CONSTRAINT PK_TGQLOGNOTIFVENC PRIMARY KEY (IDLOG))
sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE TGQLOGNOTIFVENC (IDLOG BIGINT NOT NULL, IDQUALIF BIGINT NOT NULL, TIPO_NOTIFICACAO VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL, DTNOTIF DATE NOT NULL, DHENVIO DATETIME, CONSTRAINT PK_TGQLOGNOTIFVENC PRIMARY KEY (IDLOG))
